name: Plains
description: The most common and peaceful biome, featuring vast green fields and oak forests.

name: Desert
description: A harsh, dry landscape where villagers live in sandstone structures and wear light clothing.

name: Savanna
description: A plateau-filled biome with acacia trees and unique reddish-orange clay villages.

name: Taiga
description: A dense forest of spruce trees and berry bushes, where villagers wear heavy furs.

name: Snow
description: A frozen wasteland where villages are built into the snow and villagers wear thick parkas.

name: Jungle
description: Lush tropical forests where villagers wear leaf-patterned outfits; they only appear if bred here.

name: Swamp
description: Murky waters filled with lily pads and vines; swamp villagers are recognizable by their purple robes.
